chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Transfer Application No.05 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case ----------------------------- 17.02.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ This is date by Court. Applicant and his counsel are called absent, without any intimation. Non-appearance of applicant and his counsel shows that they have lost interest in pursuing their case, therefore, instant criminal transfer application is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
